name: CreateShapefile
description: Creates a PostGIS table with attribute columns AND a geometry column named 'geom' (type auto-detected). Geometry is a DataTree: branch per row; more than one item per branch = multipart. Applies false-origin (Cx/Cy) add-back in SQL. Not a file export.

inputParameters.name: CToggle
inputParameters.description: Set True to CREATE the table and INSERT rows (destructive if replace_table=True)

inputParameters.name: columnNames
inputParameters.description: Attribute column names (parallel to column_types; optional — geometry-only table allowed)

inputParameters.name: columnTypes
inputParameters.description: SQL types parallel to column_names (e.g. text, integer, double precision)

inputParameters.name: values
inputParameters.description: Attribute DataTree — branch per row, parallel to geometry branches (optional)

inputParameters.name: idValues
inputParameters.description: Optional DataTree of primary-key values — branch per row (one id per branch); omit for auto-increment id

inputParameters.name: geometry
inputParameters.description: Rhino geometry DataTree — branch per row; >1 item per branch = multipart (required)

inputParameters.name: Cx
inputParameters.description: Correction X — false origin added back in SQL (numeric text, default '0')

inputParameters.name: Cy
inputParameters.description: Correction Y — false origin added back in SQL (numeric text, default '0')

inputParameters.name: replaceTable
inputParameters.description: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS before CREATE (destructive)
